title: अपने परिवार के बारे में लिखें
description: Family members, adjectives और emotions use करके 50+ words में लिखें।

items.source: मुझे अपने परिवार की बहुत याद आती है।
items.answer: I miss my family very much.

items.source: हम एक बड़ा और खुश परिवार हैं।
items.answer: We are a big and happy family.

blocks.prompt: अंग्रेज़ी में अपने परिवार के बारे में लिखें। कम से कम 4-5 family members के बारे में बताएँ — उनकी age, job, और 2-3 adjectives use करें।
blocks.sampleAnswer: I have a wonderful family. My mother is 52 years old. She is kind, funny, and hardworking. She is a teacher. My father is 55. He is tall, serious, and very smart. He is a businessman. I have one sister. She is 22. She is young, beautiful, and clever. She is a student. I also have a grandmother. She is 75 and very loving. I love my family very much!
